subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose letter appeared before Our countenance, that the mention of the All-Merciful may attract him unto a station wherein his atoms shall bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه لدی الوجه لیجذبه ذکر الرحمن الی مقام تشهد ذراته قد
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
